summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Credits page (/credits). All 10 credit packages render correctly with proper pricing. Package selection, sidebar updates, badges, old price display, and per-file pricing all working as expected.
passed_tests: All 10 credit packages render with correct prices (12€, 58€, 115€, 225€, 550€, 950€, 2000€, 2850€, 3600€, 4250€)
Balance display shows '1.250 Credits' in top right area
BESTSELLER badge visible on 100 Credits package (id=3)
AM BELIEBTESTEN badge visible on 1000 Credits package (id=6)
TOP DEAL badge visible on 5000 Credits package (id=10)
Old price 1.050,00€ shown crossed out on 1000 Credits package
Per-file pricing shown for 2000+ credit packages (100€/File, 95€/File, 90€/File, 85€/File)
Package selection highlights with red/primary border and shows checkmark
Purchase sidebar updates correctly when package selected (shows credits amount, price netto, inkl. MwSt.)
Purchase sidebar shows 'Alter Preis' with line-through for 1000 Credits package
Purchase sidebar shows per-file pricing for 2000+ credit packages
'Jetzt kaufen' button displays correct total price (inkl. MwSt.)
Empty state in sidebar shows 'Bitte ein Credit-Paket auswählen' when nothing selected
Benefits card shows all 5 items (Credits verfallen nie, Sichere PayPal-Zahlung, Sofortige Gutschrift, Mengenrabatte bei großen Paketen, Rechnungen als PDF)
Only one package can be selected at a time (previous selection deselected)
Dark theme styling consistent with app design

mocked_apis_list: Credit packages and balance are hardcoded in Credits.jsx

context_for_next_testing_agent: Credits page fully tested. All 10 packages with correct pricing, badges (BESTSELLER, AM BELIEBTESTEN, TOP DEAL), old price display, per-file pricing, package selection with sidebar updates, and benefits card all verified working.
